name: Clever Compact
description: Lossless compaction for OpenClaw agents. Writes a structured state file before every compact and restores it on session start. Fixes /new amnesia, compaction loss, and memory drift.

maxStateAgeHours.description: How long (in hours) to keep restoring from a state file. Default: 72.

memoryDir.description: Override the directory where state files are written. Default: <workspace>/memory.
